content:
Committed and pushed to `3415-update-homepage-welcome-text`.

**Commit:** `89b85ace` — `Update homepage welcome text for issue #3415`

**What changed:** In `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx:30`, the welcome text for signed-out users was updated from `Welcome to your new project.` to `Welcome from kody — verify run 1778740604613`.

The draft PR #3416 will update and Vercel will redeploy the same preview URL.
